nasb.text: May the Lord, the God of your fathers, increase you a thousand-fold more than you are and bless you, just as He has promised you!

esv.text: May the Lord, the God of your fathers, make you a thousand times as many as you are and bless you, as he has promised you!

cnv.text: 願耶和華你們列祖的　神，使你們比現在更多千倍，又照著他應許你們的話，賜福給你們。

ccb.text: 愿你们祖先的上帝耶和华使你们人数更增千倍，照祂的应许赐福给你们。
